title: New Strains — Breeder, Lineage & Terpene Report
disclaimer: Lineages reflect breeder-of-record claims and the most widely documented pedigrees as of mid-2026. Terpene listings are the commonly reported dominants — actual order and totals vary by phenotype, grow and cure, so verify against batch COAs. Several names are used by multiple breeders; where a cut is contested it is flagged — confirm the cut and COA at sourcing before committing it to packaging.

strains.name: Blue Zushi
strains.breeder: Originally a CA scene cut attributed to TenCo (~2019); now in seed form via Dutch Passion, Original Sensible, Growers Choice and others.
strains.aroma: Sweet candy-berry with mint and a tropical edge.
strains.notes: Indica-leaning (~60/40). Blue-tinted dense flower, high resin. Not one fixed genetic — traces to a U.S. clone whose exact parents were never fully documented; each seed house has its own interpretation, so the cut matters for phenotype, terps and potency.

strains.name: Scented Marker (in-house · ZM8)
strains.aroma: Solvent / marker-ink funk and floral candy-gas over Zkittlez candy sweetness.
strains.notes: ZM8 stacks Permanent Marker's gassy dessert-funk and color onto Zkittlez's candy sweetness. Permanent Marker = Seed Junky Genetics (bred by JBeezy), (Biscotti × Sherb Bx) × Jealousy, Leafly Strain of the Year 2023. Zkittlez = 3rd Coast / Dying Breed, Grape Ape × Grapefruit (+ undisclosed third). Strong house-exclusive story: SOTY-2023 pedigree on one side, Zkittlez candy lineage on the other.

strains.name: Subzero
strains.lineage: Super Boof × Oreoz ("Sub Zero #12" / GMSL cut)
strains.aroma: Cookies-and-cream, minty pine, heavy diesel funk.
strains.notes: A 2026 breakout — extreme white/silver trichome frost, dense purple-leaning buds. This is the one that is "new" right now. Other lines exist: North Genetics' Subzero = Strawberry Diesel × (Chemdawg × Hindu Kush) — a completely different plant. Confirm which Subzero the source is offering.

strains.name: Papaya
strains.notes: Citral #13 (Pakistani indica, citrus + resin) brings tropical-fruit terps; Ice #2 (Afghan/Skunk/Northern Lights, '98 Cannabis Cup winner) brings frost, potency, disease resistance. Indica-leaning, fast finish, very resinous — a favorite for solventless hash. Nirvana reformulated ~2022; legacy Papaya (pre-2022) was Jack Herer × Skunk #1, a different, more narcotic plant. Specify which Papaya the cut is.

strains.name: Lime
strains.lineage: Likely Key Lime Pie–type / lime-forward citrus cut
strains.aroma: Bright lime zest and citrus peel over sweet dough.
strains.notes: No single canonical "Lime" strain. Most probable: Key Lime Pie (a citrus-forward GSC/Cookies pheno; lime-zest-and-dough, indica-leaning, often shortened to "Key Lime"/"Lime") OR a lime-forward limonene-led cut (Lime OG / Lime Sorbet / house citrus pheno). Confirm whether this is a Key Lime Pie cut or a different lime selection before it goes on a label.

strains.name: MOB
strains.breeder: T.H. Seeds (Amsterdam) — genetics are an East Coast / Maine legacy strain
strains.lineage: "Mother of Berries" — Maine legacy (Blueberry/Afghan); exact parents legacy/undocumented
strains.aroma: Wild blueberry / berry jam, sweet pie.
strains.notes: a.k.a. Mother of All Berries / Maine Original Blueberry — a near-pure indica. Fast-finishing, squat, purple, deeply relaxing/sedative. 2nd in Indica at the 2015 Expo Grow Cup. Given an East Coast footprint, the Maine "Mother of Berries" provenance is an authentic angle. "MOB" also gets used for Mob Boss, Candy Mob, etc. — but as standalone "MOB" it is Mother of Berries.

strains.name: Sherb × Blue Nerdz
strains.aroma: Creamy sherbet meeting candy-berry and gas.
strains.notes: Sherb = Sunset Sherbert family (GSC × Pink Panties origin); creamy, fruity, gassy dessert, often as "Sherb Bx". Blue Nerdz is contested — two main cuts: Runtz × Zkittlez (Global Genetics LA, Spannabis 2024) and an older Forbidden Fruit × Watermelon Z (SoHum Royal). Net: a candy-gas × dessert pairing. Confirm which Blue Nerdz parent was used — the two cuts pull in different terpene directions (candy-gas vs. tropical-berry).

strains.name: Pink Panties
strains.aroma: Tart citrus and floral over an earthy Kush base.
strains.notes: Written "Pink Painties" on the list. Indica-dominant (~70/30), dense colas that blush pink/purple in cool temps, evening/sedative lean. Historically significant as a parent of Sunset Sherbert (and by extension a grandparent of the Gelato line) — strong pedigree to cite.

strains.name: Cereal Milk
strains.breeder: Powerzzzup Genetics (Kenny Dumetz) × Cookies (Berner's Cookie Fam)
strains.lineage: Y Life (GSC × Cherry Pie) × Snowman (sativa-leaning GSC pheno)
strains.aroma: Sweet milk, vanilla and doughy cereal with a hint of gas.
strains.notes: A sister pheno from the same seed hunt that produced Gary Payton. Balanced hybrid, frosty. Award history (Leafly best-of 2021, later cup recognition).

strains.name: Blueberry Muffin
strains.lineage: Purple Panty Dropper × Razzleberry (stabilized F9 line)
strains.notes: Indica-leaning (~60/40), purple-flecked frosty colas, fast 45–50 day finish. A cup winner and a reliable, high-bag-appeal flagship — easy seller on a menu.

sourcingFlags: Subzero, Lime, MOB, Blue Nerdz — names used by more than one breeder. Get breeder name + COA on each so the printed lineage is accurate.
Papaya — confirm it is the current Nirvana Citral × Ice, not the legacy Jack Herer × Skunk.
Scented Marker / ZM8 — your own cross; you control the lineage claim (Permanent Marker × Zkittlez).

Terpene and THC figures are aggregated from breeder, lab-profile and dispensary sources and vary by phenotype, grow, and cure — treat them as directional, not guaranteed. Confirm against batch COAs before printing.
